results.notes: Page renders empty-state; backend GET /api/v1/assets returns 403 for RECRUITMENT_ADMIN. UI does NOT show Access Denied gate — instead shows empty state with 'Add Asset' CTA (see BUG-W2-02).
Proper Access Denied gate rendered. RECRUITMENT_ADMIN correctly refused.
Full holiday calendar renders (10 holidays, 8 national, 2 festival). Page accessible to RECRUITMENT_ADMIN as expected (HOLIDAY:VIEW is shared perm).
Page renders with 'Request Overtime' CTA and tabs, but backend returns 403. See BUG-W2-03 — inconsistent gating.
Proper Access Denied gate rendered. First nav attempt caused renderer hang/timeout (recovered after re-nav); possible transient issue.
Probation page renders with empty state. Backend returns 200 (probation is shared HR read). Tabs: Active/Upcoming/History.
Letter Generation page renders with templates dropdown (22 letter types) and empty state. Full UI.
HARD 404 — Next.js not-found.tsx rendered. Route does not exist in frontend. See BUG-W2-01.
Page renders UI with 'New Contract' CTA despite backend 403. See BUG-W2-04.
